query: SELECT c.id as courseId, c.code, c.title as courseTitle, l.id as lessonId, l.title as lessonTitle, l.lessonOrder FROM courses c JOIN lessons l ON c.id = l.courseId WHERE c.code = 'NEW_TESTAMENT_SURVEY' ORDER BY l.lessonOrder
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2KiCrCqNDFcXt7P.577d1a63eeb5 --database P2Dpw9MQsmxzdUQCfGjV6b --execute SELECT c.id as courseId, c.code, c.title as courseTitle, l.id as lessonId, l.title as lessonTitle, l.lessonOrder FROM courses c JOIN lessons l ON c.id = l.courseId WHERE c.code = 'NEW_TESTAMENT_SURVEY' ORDER BY l.lessonOrder

rows.lessonTitle: Introduction to the New Testament Canon and Historical Context
The Synoptic Gospels - Matthew, Mark, and Luke
The Gospel According to John - The Theological Gospel
The Acts of the Apostles - The Church's Mission Empowered by the Holy Spirit
Pauline Theology - The Apostle to the Gentiles
Romans - The Gospel of God's Righteousness
The Corinthian Correspondence - Addressing Church Dysfunction
The Prison Epistles - Ephesians, Philippians, Colossians, Philemon
